dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: The Cave of No Return. A forgotten abyss, carved into the very heart of the underworld. Here, children were brought, not to live, but to be reborn.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Reborn as shadows. As weapons. As reapers.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: CLANG! SCRAPE!

dialogue.speaker: MASTER GO
dialogue.line: Faster, you worms! Do you wish to die a slow, agonizing death in the dark? Or a swift, clean one at the hands of your prey?

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: WHIP! THWACK!

dialogue.speaker: PYO WOL
dialogue.line: (My body aches. Every muscle screams. But pain is a luxury I cannot afford.)

dialogue.speaker: PYO WOL
dialogue.line: (They took everything. My name, my family, my future. All that remains is this hollow shell, honed into a blade.)

dialogue.speaker: MASTER GO
dialogue.line: You, boy! Number 7! Your stance is weak! Your eyes betray hesitation!

dialogue.speaker: PYO WOL
dialogue.line: (Number 7. That is all I am to them. A number. A tool. But a tool can break free from its wielder.)

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: SHING! SWISH!

dialogue.speaker: PYO WOL
dialogue.line: (The 'Thousand Shadow Steps'. Designed to make one disappear, to become one with the darkness. But I will use it to escape the darkness.)

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: THUD! GRUNT!

dialogue.speaker: FELLOW TRAINEE
dialogue.line: G-Gah! You... you moved like a ghost!

dialogue.speaker: PYO WOL
dialogue.line: (A ghost. Yes. That is what I must become. Unseen. Untraceable. Until the moment I strike.)

dialogue.speaker: MASTER GO
dialogue.line: Hmph. Not bad, Number 7. You have potential. A cold heart, a sharp mind. The makings of a true killer.

dialogue.speaker: MASTER GO
dialogue.line: But potential is useless without purpose. Remember your purpose, boy. To serve. To eliminate. To be the unseen hand that guides the world.

dialogue.speaker: PYO WOL
dialogue.line: (My purpose is my own. To reclaim what was stolen. To make them pay.)

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: CRACK! (Sound of bone snapping, from a training dummy)

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Years passed in the gloom. Each day, a lesson in death. Each night, a silent vow.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Pyo Wol learned to kill with his bare hands, with a needle, with a whisper. He learned to become a phantom.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: SWISH! THWACK! (Rapid, precise strikes)

dialogue.speaker: MASTER GO
dialogue.line: Excellent, Number 7! Your 'Ghostly Dagger' technique is flawless! No one will see it coming!

dialogue.speaker: PYO WOL
dialogue.line: (Flawless. Good. Flawless is what I need to survive. Flawless is what I need to escape.)

dialogue.speaker: PYO WOL
dialogue.line: (They believe they control me. They believe they have broken me. But beneath the ice, a fire burns.)

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: WHOOSH! (Pyo Wol moves incredibly fast)

dialogue.speaker: MASTER GO
dialogue.line: Incredible! He's faster than any of the others! A true prodigy of the shadows!

dialogue.speaker: PYO WOL
dialogue.line: (Prodigy or not, I am a prisoner. And prisoners dream of freedom.)

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: The whispers of the outside world were faint, but they reached even the deepest parts of the Cave. Rumors of a great war, of shifting powers in the Murim.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: And with these rumors, a new directive came down from the unseen masters.

dialogue.speaker: MASTER GO
dialogue.line: Listen up, all of you! The time of your deployment draws near! The Murim is in turmoil, and our masters require their finest blades!

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: MURMURS (Among the trainees)

dialogue.speaker: PYO WOL
dialogue.line: (Deployment. To the outside world. My chance.)

dialogue.speaker: PYO WOL
dialogue.line: (They will send me out as their weapon. But I will be my own.)

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Pyo Wol looked at his reflection in a small, still puddle of water. A boy’s face, but with eyes that held the emptiness of a thousand deaths.

dialogue.speaker: PYO WOL
dialogue.line: (The Reaper of the Drifting Moon. Soon, the Murim will know that name. And it will tremble.)

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: DRIP... DRIP...

summary: Pyo Wol is introduced as a young boy trapped in the 'Cave of No Return', an assassin training facility. He endures brutal training, honing his skills into a lethal weapon while harboring a deep-seated desire for escape and revenge against those who imprisoned him. The episode ends with the announcement of the trainees' imminent deployment to the outside world.
